FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f765da4e610>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-09T14:15:01Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-09T14:13:16Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-09T14:15:01Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-09T14:13:16Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/09 14:16:32.050229560 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050250389 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050281407 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050282749 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress, timestamp, producer, author)
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050305201 {
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050306062 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050319127 new <- list()
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050320039 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050334005 new$width <- width
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050334776 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050375732 new$height <- height
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050376794 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050391782 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050392573 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050407702 new$title <- title
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050410276 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050425404 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050426186 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050441314 new$version <- version
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050442086 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050457244 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050458245 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050516754 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050520471 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050540839 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050541861 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050552691 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050561116 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050562108 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050577356 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050578328 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050592795 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050593617 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050627129 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050628151 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050651685 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050652506 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050667083 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050668025 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050682712 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050683624 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050698061 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050698862 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050713870 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050714752 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050729059 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050729830 new$author <- author
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050743075 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050743946 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050764084 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/09 14:16:32.050779242 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050780093 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050798117 "default"))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050798969 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050811702 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050812524 }
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050825688 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050826530 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050843992 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050844884 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050858610 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050859461 }
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050872756 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050873627 }
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050886201 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050887012 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050901559 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050902411 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050917599 domain = NA)
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050918451 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050932076 }
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050932818 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050945922 old$family <- family
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050946763 }
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050957955 version <- old$version
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050960089 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050982230 "2.0")
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050983152 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050997248 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/09 14:16:32.050998070 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/09 14:16:32.051017105 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/09 14:16:32.051017937 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/09 14:16:32.051033556 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/09 14:16:32.051034387 domain = NA)
2026/06/09 14:16:32.051074732 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/09 14:16:32.051075994 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/09 14:16:32.051097905 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/09 14:16:32.051098697 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/09 14:16:32.051111710 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
2026/06/09 14:16:32.051132971 old$author)
